headline: Netflix's Global Sensation Shatters Streaming Records
lede: Korean supernatural action film 'KPop Demon Hunters' demolishes viewership benchmarks, proving the unstoppable global appeal of South Korean entertainment.
body:
Netflix has another watershed moment with its breakout international hit 'KPop Demon Hunters', which has officially become the platform's most-watched film in streaming history.

The genre-bending supernatural action movie has captivated global audiences with its innovative blend of K-pop star power and high-octane demon-fighting narrative. Industry analysts point to the film's seamless integration of music, martial arts, and mythological storytelling as key to its unprecedented success.

Netflix's strategic investment in international content continues to pay massive dividends. The streaming giant has consistently demonstrated its ability to identify and amplify cross-cultural entertainment that transcends traditional market boundaries.

While specific viewership numbers remain closely guarded, industry insiders suggest the film has attracted over 200 million global viewers since its debut. This milestone underscores the rising global influence of Korean entertainment and Netflix's sophisticated content acquisition strategy.

The film's success also highlights a broader trend of international content finding massive mainstream audiences in an increasingly connected digital entertainment landscape.
key_facts: First Netflix film to exceed 200 million global viewers
Blends music, action, and supernatural genres
